question: will there be a Substack TV app for Fire TV?
reason: No official Substack TV app for Fire TV has been announced or released as of May 27, 2026.
evidence: Substack launched TV apps for Apple TV and Google TV on January 22, 2026, but no mention of Fire TV support.
No official announcements or news reports indicate plans for a Fire TV app.
The Substack TV app is currently in beta for Apple TV and Google TV.
Substack has not provided updates regarding a Fire TV app since the initial launch.
No information suggests that Substack is developing a Fire TV app.
The absence of a Fire TV app may be due to technical challenges or strategic decisions.
